name: Passionate Lovemaking
descrip: Make sweet love to your opponent, requires charmed target, and will charm you. Has a slightly higher crit chance and crit damage.
outcome: |f|ApplyStatusEffect|/|Charm|n|[AttackerName] lovingly fucks [TargetName]'s [SexAdjective][SexWord] with infatuated passion, and [TargetHeOrShe] loses [TargetHisOrHer]self in the moment while they interlock their bodies, moaning in blissful delight as the two of them gaze into the others eyes.
miss: |f|ApplyStatusEffect|/|Charm|n|[AttackerName] lovingly fucks [TargetName]'s [SexAdjective][SexWord] with infatuated passion, and [TargetHeOrShe] loses [TargetHisOrHer]self in the moment while they interlock their bodies, but [TargetHeOrShe] seems unaffected!
